sentences.en: One of the most eminent of psychologists, Clark Hull, claimed that the essence of reasoning lies in the putting together of two 'behaviour segments' in some novel way, never actually performed before, so as to reach a goal.
sentences.zh: 最杰出的心理学家之一克拉克·赫尔声称:推理的本质在于把两个"行为片段"以某种从未实际做过的新颖方式组合起来,从而达成目标。

grammar.note: Clark Hull 是主语 One of the most eminent of psychologists 的同位语;claimed that 引导宾语从句;lie in "在于";never actually performed before 过去分词短语修饰 way;so as to "以便"。

sentences.en: Two followers of Clark Hull, Howard and Tracey Kendler, devised a test for children that was explicitly based on Clark Hull's principles.
sentences.zh: 克拉克·赫尔的两位追随者——霍华德·肯德勒与特蕾西·肯德勒——设计了一项明确基于赫尔原理的儿童测试。

grammar.note: Howard and Tracey Kendler 是 Two followers 的同位语;that was explicitly based on... 定语从句修饰 test;explicitly "明确地"。

sentences.en: The children were given the task of learning to operate a machine so as to get a toy.
sentences.zh: 孩子们的任务是学会操作一台机器,以获得玩具。

grammar.note: were given the task 双宾语结构的被动式;of learning... 动名词短语作 task 的同位性定语;so as to 表目的。

sentences.en: In order to succeed they had to go through a two-stage sequence.
sentences.zh: 要想成功,他们必须完成一个两阶段的流程。

grammar.note: In order to succeed 句首目的状语;go through "经历,完成";two-stage 复合形容词,stage 用单数。

sentences.en: The children were trained on each stage separately.
sentences.zh: 孩子们在每个阶段分别接受训练。

grammar.note: were trained 一般过去时被动;separately 副词"分别地"。

sentences.en: The stages consisted merely of pressing the correct one of two buttons to get a marble; and of inserting the marble into a small hole to release the toy.
sentences.zh: 这两个阶段仅仅是:按对两个按钮中的一个,得到一颗弹珠;再把弹珠放进一个小孔,让玩具掉出来。

grammar.note: consisted of doing... and of doing... 两个动名词短语并列;merely 强调"仅仅";两个 to do 不定式均表目的。

sentences.en: The Kendlers found that the children could learn the separate bits readily enough.
sentences.zh: 肯德勒夫妇发现,孩子们能相当轻松地学会各个单独的环节。

grammar.note: found that... 宾语从句;readily enough "足够轻松地",enough 后置修饰副词 readily。

sentences.en: Given the task of getting a marble by pressing the button they could get the marble; given the task of getting a toy when a marble was handed to them, they could use the marble.
sentences.zh: 给他们"按按钮取弹珠"的任务,他们能取到弹珠;给他们"拿到弹珠后取玩具"的任务,他们也会用弹珠。

grammar.type: 过去分词条件状语(对仗)
grammar.note: 两个 Given...(相当于 If they were given...)过去分词短语作条件状语,前后结构对仗;when a marble was handed to them 时间状语从句。

sentences.en: (All they had to do was put it in a hole.)
sentences.zh: (他们要做的只是把它放进孔里。)

grammar.note: All they had to do 中省略了关系词 that;表语不定式 put 前省略 to(前面出现 do 时表语不定式常省 to)。

sentences.en: But they did not for the most part 'integrate', to use the Kendlers' terminology.
sentences.zh: 但用肯德勒夫妇的术语来说,他们大多没有做到"整合"。

grammar.note: for the most part "大体上,多数情况下"插入谓语中;to use the Kendlers' terminology 不定式作插入语"借用……的术语"。

sentences.en: They did not press the button to get the marble and then proceed without further help to use the marble to get the toy.
sentences.zh: 他们不会自己按按钮取得弹珠,然后在没有进一步帮助的情况下,接着用弹珠去换玩具。

grammar.note: did not 的否定范围覆盖 press... and then proceed... 两个并列动词;proceed to do "接着做";without further help 介词短语作状语。

sentences.en: So the Kendlers concluded that they were incapable of deductive reasoning.
sentences.zh: 于是肯德勒夫妇得出结论:孩子们不具备演绎推理能力。

grammar.note: concluded that... 宾语从句;be incapable of "没有……的能力";deductive reasoning "演绎推理"为本文核心概念。

sentences.en: The mystery at first appears to deepen when we learn, from another psychologist, Michael Cole, and his colleagues, that adults in an African culture apparently cannot do the Kendlers' task either.
sentences.zh: 当我们从另一位心理学家迈克尔·科尔及其同事那里得知,某个非洲文化中的成年人显然也做不出肯德勒夫妇的任务时,这个谜起初似乎更深了。

grammar.type: when 从句 + 被分隔的宾语从句
grammar.note: learn 的宾语从句 that... 被插入语 from another psychologist... 分隔;appear to do "似乎";否定句用 either 表"也(不)"。

sentences.en: But it lessens, on the other hand, when we learn that a task was devised which was strictly analogous to the Kendlers' one but much easier for the African males to handle.
sentences.zh: 但另一方面,当我们得知有人设计了一个与肯德勒任务严格类似、却让非洲男性容易上手得多的任务时,谜团又减小了。

grammar.note: which was strictly analogous... 定语从句修饰 a task,与先行词被谓语 was devised 分隔;analogous to "与……类似";for sb to handle 不定式复合结构。

sentences.en: Instead of the button-pressing machine, Cole used a locked box and two differently coloured match-boxes, one of which contained a key that would open the box.
sentences.zh: 科尔不用按按钮的机器,而是用了一个上锁的盒子和两个颜色不同的火柴盒,其中一个火柴盒里装着能打开盒子的钥匙。

grammar.type: one of which 定语从句
grammar.note: instead of "代替,而不是";one of which contained... 非限制性定语从句;that would open the box 又一层定语从句修饰 key。

sentences.en: Notice that there are still two behaviour segments — 'open the right match-box to get the key' and 'use the key to open the box' - so the task seems formally to be the same.
sentences.zh: 注意,这里仍然有两个行为片段——"打开正确的火柴盒拿到钥匙"和"用钥匙打开盒子"——所以从形式上看,任务似乎是一样的。

grammar.note: Notice that... 祈使句引导读者注意;破折号内两个引语并列,作 segments 的同位语;formally "在形式上"。

sentences.en: But psychologically it is quite different.
sentences.zh: 但从心理层面上看,它截然不同。

grammar.note: psychologically 评注性副词"从心理上说",与上句 formally 对照。

sentences.en: Now the subject is dealing not with a strange machine but with familiar meaningful objects; and it is clear to him what he is meant to do.
sentences.zh: 现在受试者面对的不是陌生的机器,而是熟悉且有意义的物品;而且他清楚自己该做什么。

grammar.note: deal not with A but with B "打交道的不是A而是B";it is clear to him what... 中 it 为形式主语,what 从句是真正主语;be meant to do "应该做"。

sentences.en: It then turns out that the difficulty of 'integration' is greatly reduced.
sentences.zh: 结果表明,"整合"的难度大大降低了。

grammar.type: it turns out that 句型
grammar.note: It turns out that... "结果证明",it 为形式主语;is reduced 被动语态。

sentences.en: Recent work by Simon Hewson is of great interest here for it shows that, for young children, too, the difficulty lies not in the inferential processes which the task demands, but in certain perplexing features of the apparatus and the procedure.
sentences.zh: 西蒙·休森最近的研究在这里很值得关注,因为它表明:对幼儿来说,困难同样不在于任务所要求的推理过程,而在于装置和程序中某些令人困惑的特征。

grammar.type: for 原因分句 + not...but 结构
grammar.note: be of great interest = very interesting(of+抽象名词);for 引导原因分句;lies not in A but in B "不在于A而在于B";which the task demands 定语从句修饰 processes。

sentences.en: When these are changed in ways which do not at all affect the inferential nature of the problem, then five-year-old children solve the problem as well as college students did in the Kendlers' own experiments.
sentences.zh: 当以完全不影响问题推理本质的方式改变这些特征后,五岁儿童解题的表现,就和肯德勒夫妇自己实验中的大学生一样好。

grammar.type: when 从句 + as well as 同级比较
grammar.note: which do not at all affect... 定语从句修饰 ways;not at all "完全不";as well as college students did 同级比较,did 替代 solved the problem。

sentences.en: Hewson made two crucial changes.
sentences.zh: 休森做了两处关键改动。

grammar.note: 简洁的总起句,下文分述两处改动(First... / Then...)。

sentences.en: First, he replaced the button-pressing mechanism in the side panels by drawers in these panels which the child could open and shut.
sentences.zh: 第一,他把侧面板上按按钮的装置,换成了面板上可供孩子开合的抽屉。

grammar.note: replace A by B "用B替换A";which the child could open and shut 定语从句修饰 drawers,关系词作宾语。

sentences.en: This took away the mystery from the first stage of training.
sentences.zh: 这消除了训练第一阶段的神秘感。

grammar.note: take away A from B "从B中去除A"。

sentences.en: Then he helped the child to understand that there was no 'magic' about the specific marble which, during the second stage of training, the experimenter handed to him so that he could pop it in the hole and get the reward.
sentences.zh: 第二,他帮助孩子理解:训练第二阶段实验者递给他、让他塞进孔里换取奖励的那颗特定弹珠,并没有什么"魔力"。

grammar.note: help sb to do;that 引导宾语从句;which... 定语从句修饰 marble,从句内被时间状语 during... 分隔;so that 引导目的状语从句。

sentences.en: A child understands nothing, after all, about how a marble put into a hole can open a little door.
sentences.zh: 毕竟,孩子完全不明白:一颗放进孔里的弹珠,怎么就能打开一扇小门。

grammar.note: about how... 介词+宾语从句;put into a hole 过去分词短语作后置定语修饰 marble;after all 插入语"毕竟"。

sentences.en: How is he to know that any other marble of similar size will do just as well?
sentences.zh: 他又怎么会知道,随便一颗大小相近的弹珠也一样管用呢?

grammar.note: How is he to know...? "他怎么能知道",be to do 表可能/应该;will do 意为"行得通,管用";just as well 同级比较,省略比较后项。

sentences.en: Yet he must assume that if he is to solve the problem.
sentences.zh: 然而,要想解开这个问题,他必须假定这一点。

grammar.type: if 条件从句(be to do)
grammar.note: that 为代词,指代上句"任何相似弹珠都管用"这一事实,作 assume 的宾语;if he is to solve... "如果他想要解决……",be to do 表意图。

sentences.en: Hewson made the functional equivalence of different marbles clear by playing a 'swapping game' with the children.
sentences.zh: 休森通过和孩子们玩"交换游戏",让他们明白不同弹珠在功能上是等价的。

grammar.note: make... clear 中宾语 the functional equivalence of different marbles 较长,形容词补语 clear 后置;by doing 表方式。

sentences.en: The two modifications together produced a jump in success rates from 30 per cent to 90 per cent for five-year-olds and from 35 per cent to 72.5 per cent for four-year-olds.
sentences.zh: 这两处改动加在一起,使五岁儿童的成功率从30%跃升到90%,四岁儿童的成功率从35%跃升到72.5%。

grammar.note: produce a jump in... "使……跃升";两组 from...to...for... 介词短语并列,分别对应两个年龄组。

sentences.en: For three-year-olds, for reasons that are still in need of clarification, no improvement — rather a slight drop in performance - resulted from the change.
sentences.zh: 至于三岁儿童,出于尚待澄清的原因,这一改动没有带来任何提高——反而使表现略有下降。

grammar.note: for reasons that... 定语从句"出于……的原因";破折号内 rather a slight drop... 对 no improvement 作修正补充;result from "由……造成"。

sentences.en: We may conclude, then, that children experience very real difficulty when faced with the Kendler apparatus; but this difficulty cannot be taken as proof that they are incapable of deductive reasoning.
sentences.zh: 因此我们可以得出结论:孩子们面对肯德勒装置时确实遇到了非常实际的困难;但这种困难不能被当作他们不具备演绎推理能力的证据。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 同位语从句
grammar.note: conclude that... 宾语从句;when faced with = when they are faced with(状语从句省略主语和be);be taken as "被当作";proof that... 同位语从句说明 proof 的内容。全文结论句。
